package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_accepts_http_request_dto: Repositories that accept transport DTOs instead of repository inputs or domain values.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule123NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule123NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule123NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario123Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule123NegativeService, input Rule123NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
